title: 防御Mythos级模型倒计时4-8个月
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Ethan Mollick
@emollick
Assuming open models continue to lag about 8-12 months behind closed source (at least in coding), the countdown to hardening IT systems against Mythos-class models is now at 4-8 months
Having publicly available and relatively safe defensive Mythos-class models today is important
5:36 PM · Jun 16, 2026 23.3K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: 防御Mythos级模型倒计时4-8个月
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 假设开源模型持续落后闭源约8-12个月（至少在编程方面），加强IT系统以防御Mythos级模型的倒计时现在为4-8个月。 拥有今天公开可用且相对安全的防御性Mythos级模型很重要。

key_excerpts.text: 假设开源模型持续落后闭源约8-12个月（至少在编程方面），加强IT系统以防御Mythos级模型的倒计时现在为4-8个月。 拥有今天公开可用且相对安全的防御性Mythos级模型很重要。
